# The canonical kitchen sink: one document that exercises every surface
# of the FORMAT-2 vocabulary (docs/FORMAT.md).  Three consumers keep it
# honest: the ERT suite parses it, registers it, and lints every view
# body; the bundle smoke test compiles it and loads the result on a bare
# jetpacs-core; and the JVM suite parses, validates, and round-trips it
# through OrgCodec as a gallery template.  If a format feature works
# here, it works end-to-end — when a new view kind or column type is
# added, the kind-coverage test fails until this file grows with it.
#
# Views are titled after their kind on purpose; the data is a small
# household demo.  Every view is self-contained (inline data or a
# relative source scaffolded next to the document), so the app works
# wherever the file lands.
#
# It also demonstrates navigation placement (docs/FORMAT.md).  Nine
# views would cram a bottom bar, so: the four task views share
# `:GROUP: Tasks' — one bottom destination with a top tab row swiping
# between them — and the two reference views carry `:NAV: drawer', which
# routes them into the hamburger.  The bar is left with four clean
# destinations: Table, Tasks, Tree, Shopping.
#+JETPACS_APP: hello-world
#+TITLE: Hello World
#+JETPACS_ICON: waving_hand
#+JETPACS_ORDER: 90
#+JETPACS_APP_FORMAT: 2
#+TODO: TODO NEXT | DONE CANCELLED
#+TAGS: home errand fun

* Table
:PROPERTIES:
:ICON: table_chart
:ORDER: 10
:KIND: table
:COLTYPES: text number date enum(Low,Mid,High) checkbox
:END:

Every column type in one inline table (the header row is the schema).

| Item          | Qty | Expires    | Stock | Restock |
|---------------+-----+------------+-------+---------|
| Milk          |   2 | 2026-07-20 | Low   | [X]     |
| Rice 🍚       |  10 | 2027-01-01 | High  | [ ]     |
| Café beans    |   1 | 2026-08-15 | Mid   | [ ]     |

* Checklist
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 20
:KIND: checklist
:NAV: drawer
:END:

- [ ] Water the plants
- [X] Take out the recycling
- [ ] Fix the squeaky door

* Records
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 30
:KIND: records
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Task) %TODO(Status) %PRIORITY %DEADLINE %SCHEDULED %TAGS %EFFORT %CATEGORY %Assignee(Who) %Room
:COLTYPES: text enum(TODO,NEXT,DONE,CANCELLED) enum(A,B,C) date date text text text text enum(Kitchen,Garage,Garden)
:FILTER: (not (done))
:ACTIONS: todo(DONE) schedule deadline tags(home,errand) priority(A) refile(* Archive) archive(subtree)
:GROUP: Tasks
:END:

Direct children are the records: all eight schema specials, custom
drawer properties, a filter, and the full action vocabulary.

** TODO [#A] Fix the leaking tap :home:
DEADLINE: <2026-07-20 Mon>
:PROPERTIES:
:Assignee: Caleb
:Room: Kitchen
:Effort: 0:30
:END:

** NEXT Paint the fence :fun:
SCHEDULED: <2026-07-15 Wed>
:PROPERTIES:
:Assignee: Sam
:Room: Garden
:END:

** DONE Sweep the garage
:PROPERTIES:
:Room: Garage
:END:

* Board
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 40
:KIND: board
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Chore) %TODO(Status) %PRIORITY
:COLTYPES: text enum(TODO,NEXT,DONE,CANCELLED) enum(A,B,C)
:GROUP_BY: TODO
:GROUP: Tasks
:END:

Lanes come from the file's #+TODO: sequence; cards move lanes via the
footer buttons.

** TODO Vacuum the stairs
** NEXT [#B] Sort the mail
** DONE Empty the dishwasher

* Calendar
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 50
:KIND: calendar
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Event) %SCHEDULED(When) %DEADLINE(Due)
:COLTYPES: text date date
:DATE_FIELD: SCHEDULED
:GROUP: Tasks
:END:

** TODO Dentist appointment
SCHEDULED: <2026-07-16 Thu>

** TODO Library books due
SCHEDULED: <2026-07-24 Fri>
DEADLINE: <2026-07-24 Fri>

* Gallery
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 60
:KIND: gallery
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Plant) %Photo(Photo)
:COLTYPES: text text
:IMAGE_FIELD: Photo
:GROUP: Tasks
:END:

** Monstera
:PROPERTIES:
:Photo: https://example.com/monstera.jpg
:END:

** Fern
:PROPERTIES:
:Photo: https://example.com/fern.jpg
:END:

* Tree
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 70
:KIND: tree
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Node)
:END:

** House
*** Kitchen
*** Garage
** Garden
*** Vegetable patch

* Notes
:PROPERTIES:
:ORDER: 80
:KIND: notes
:SOURCE: vault/
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Title) %CATEGORY(Category)
:COLTYPES: text text
:NAV: drawer
:END:

A vulpea vault directory: one .org note file per record.  Without
vulpea installed the view degrades to a placeholder — the app still
loads on a bare jetpacs-core.

* Shopping
:PROPERTIES:
:ICON: shopping_cart
:ORDER: 90
:KIND: table
:SOURCE: shopping-list.org
:COLUMNS: Item | Qty | Done
:COLTYPES: text number checkbox
:END:

An external relative source: the runtime scaffolds shopping-list.org
(header row from :COLUMNS:) next to this document on first load.

* Dashboard
:PROPERTIES:
:ICON: bar_chart
:ORDER: 100
:KIND: dashboard
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Item) %Category %Amount
:COLTYPES: text text number
:GROUP_BY: Category
:METRICS: count | sum(Amount) | avg(Amount)
:NAV: drawer
:END:

** Paint
:PROPERTIES:
:Category: House
:Amount: 40
:END:

** Seeds
:PROPERTIES:
:Category: Garden
:Amount: 12
:END:

* Timeline
:PROPERTIES:
:ICON: view_timeline
:ORDER: 110
:KIND: gantt
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Task) %TODO(Progress) %SCHEDULED(Start) %DEADLINE(End)
:COLTYPES: text text date date
:NAV: drawer
:END:

** TODO Prepare beds
SCHEDULED: <2026-03-01 Sun>
DEADLINE: <2026-03-05 Thu>

** NEXT Plant seeds
SCHEDULED: <2026-03-06 Fri>
DEADLINE: <2026-03-12 Thu>
